response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff/Senior engineer with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, directly matching the core stack. Furthermore, his explicit experience with AI agent infrastructure, alongside a massive background in testing (TDD, custom test runners) and cloud deployments, makes him an exceptionally strong fit for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Explicit experience with AI agent infrastructure and MCP
Deep expertise in testing methodologies, TDD, and CI/CD
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest (though easily transferable)
History of relatively short tenures (1-2 years) in several past roles
Heavy historical focus on DLang is irrelevant to the required stack
